title: PIEKM: ML-based Procedural Information Extraction and Knowledge Management System for Materials Science Literature
research_areas: T11 Information Extraction, Named Entity Recognition, Relationship Extraction and Event Detection
T13 Knowledge discovery/representation (knowledge graphs, linked data, terminologies, lexicons, ontologies, etc.)
